name: Neutral blood exchange
summary: Neutral blood exchange is normalized for plasma-dilution and circulating-factor mouse rejuvenation evidence.
mechanism_summary: Dilutes or exchanges plasma components to test whether reducing age-associated circulating factors improves tissue readouts.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Neutral blood exchange and plasma dilution rejuvenation study; Plasma dilution improved aged mouse tissue readouts.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
